disambiguation_rules.secretary of state: Cabinet-level agency head with authority to appoint 2 OTC board members
disambiguation_rules.director of national intelligence: Position with authority to appoint 2 OTC board members (already in community context)
disambiguation_rules.director of the central intelligence age: New role explicitly named in SEC. 8(b) as potential sponsor of OTC; distinct from Director of National Intelligence

oddities.note: Document provided is the enacting clause and title only; full legislative text not included for comprehensive entity extraction.
